title: Widespread price increase in gaming hardware
summary: Various reports and company statements warn about increases in consoles, components, and RAM.

title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 premieres on Netflix this fall
summary: The anime series returns with new characters in Night City, confirmed for fall this year.

title: Star Fox, Kingdom Come 2, and Meccha Chameleon achieve major commercial milestones
summary: The Star Fox remake tops charts, Kingdom Come 2 sells six million, and Meccha Chameleon surpasses ten million copies.

summary: Anime studio MAPPA presents its next project, a Japanese film returns to theaters, and a video game explores Tokyo's pop culture.

summary: PlayStation's president reaffirms commitment to live service titles despite mixed results.

title: CD Projekt unifies under the CD Projekt Red brand
summary: The Polish company simplifies its corporate name to align all its divisions.

title: Microsoft urges caution over reports of GTA 6 pre-orders on PS5
summary: The company says that sales data multiplied by eight does not represent actual pre-orders.

title: Dead or Alive 6 Last Round sparks controversy for its over 400 DLCs
summary: The re-release forces players to repurchase content and accumulates mostly negative reviews on Steam.

summary: The Marvel fighting game confirms its beta for PS5 and PC with a surprising roster of characters.

summary: A trailer for the fighting game sparks speculation about the identity of this mysterious fighter.

title: Artificial intelligence in the spotlight of the video game industry
summary: While Reddit's CEO comments on the inevitability of AI, a study uses Age of Empires to question its true cognition.

summary: Several classic titles from different generations are updated with new versions or ports to PC.

summary: Polygon recommends the best side quests and Kotaku celebrates the 25th anniversary of a cult RPG.

summary: The New Vegas director details Obsidian's 'Karma department' and praises the TV adaptation.
